subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The serenity, patience and steadfastness, the rapture, attraction and enchantment of His Holiness have become the cause of joy and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله سلامتی و صبر و اصطبار و وجد و جذب و انجذاب آنحضرت سبب ظهور فرح و
